name: Mrs Fields Butterscotch Pecan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300°F.
2. In a bowl, combine flour, soda, and salt. Mix well and set aside.
3. In a large bowl with an electric mixer, beat sugar and butter until a grainy paste forms. Scrape down the sides of the bowl.
4. Add eggs and vanilla, and beat at medium speed until soft and lumpy.
5. Add the flour mixture and chopped pecans until combined.
6. Drop dough by rounded tablespoons 2 inches apart onto ungreased cookie sheets. Place one whole pecan in the center of each cookie.
7. Bake for 23-25 minutes or until cookie edges begin to brown lightly.
8. Transfer cookies immediately to a cool, flat surface with a spatula.
9. To prepare the caramel glaze: Melt caramels and cream in a small saucepan over low heat. Stir until smooth. Remove from heat and drizzle cooled cookies with the caramel glaze in desired pattern using a spoon or fork.
